prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: 26C-LBLH-ACACIAWOODUTENSILSET-5PC-BUN Product Type: FOOD_SPATULA Brand (from catalog): LABREA LIFE + HOME Existing Title: Labrea Life + Home 5pc Solid Acacia Wooden Kitchen Utensils Set Cooking Baking Home Essentials, 12 Inch Description: In opposition to harsh metal or manufactured silicone kitchen utensils, opt for a more a natural option in your kitchen with Labrea Life + Homes’ Solid Acacia Wooden Kitchen Utensils Collection.

These wooden kitchen utensils are firstly and importantly, food safe for all meal prep, cooking, baking, tasting and serving; furthermore, the wooden kitchen utensils won’t scratch or mark your pots and pans like other kitchen utensils can, especially where ceramic and non stick cookware or bakeware are concerned.

Meeting at the corner of function and form, these classic wooden kitchen utensils features a comfortable, rounded handle for ease of use when stirring or mixing, soft, smooth edges, balanced weight, vintage details and natural wood grain finish. Whether for cooking pasta, mixing up homemade chocolate chip cookie batter or serving a fresh salad, you’ll reach for these wooden kitchen utensils home essentials item time and time again for their versatility and practicality across the kitchen.

Featuring a classic and simple design, we love these wooden kitchen utensils not only for their timelessness and quality material construction, but for the welcomed dose of soft and organic visual texture. Functional, stylish and reliable, these solid acacia wooden kitchen utensils will be a great addition to top drawer tools or countertop utensil crock for all your cooking and baking needs. Set includes a standard cooking spoon, corner spoon, skimmer, solid spatula and slotted spatula or spurtle.

PLEASE NOTE: Utensils may vary in color and grain striations, due to the natural acacia wood material

CARE INSTRUCTIONS: To maintain finish and avoid cracking, hand washing is recommended; remove excess water after hand washing and leave to air dry Search Terms: Wooden kitchen utensil set cooking baking food meal prep serveware wedding house warming gifts new home chef restaurant equipment bakeware kitchen gadgets wooden spoon farmhouse tablescape home decor acacia wood utensils home essentials organization Features: - NATURAL WOOD GRAIN: Please note that items may vary in color and grain due to the natural acacia wood material of these wooden kitchen utensils and kitchen utensil sets - FOOD SAFE KITCHEN UTENSILS: Natural acacia wooden cooking utensils are safe for all food and meal prep, cooking and baking; the wooden kitchen utensils are safe to use with ceramic or non stick pots, pans and other cookware - SOLID ACACIA WOOD COOKING UTENSILS: Acacia wood kitchen utensils features a comfortable rounded handle, soft edges, natural wood grain and food safe finish; in addition to their practicality and versatility, they also add a welcomed dose of organic visual texture - KITCHEN ESSENTIALS: Solid acacia wooden kitchen utensils are a must have home essentials item you’ll reach for time and time again for meal prep, cooking, baking and serving; these cooking utensils features a timeless design, complemented by a soft and natural finish - SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 12 x 3 x 0.5 inches approximately, styles vary; Dishwasher Safe: No, handwash only and air dry === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Labrea Life + Home 5-pc 12 inch Acacia Wooden Utensils Set

openai.item_name: Labrea Life + Home 5-pk 12 in Acacia Wooden Kitchen Utensils Set
